title: COSTA AZUL BEACH LOT
location_text: Costa Azul Beach: A Tropical Paradise in El SalvadorWhen it comes to breathtaking beaches, El Salvador is a hidden gem, and Costa Azul Beach is one of its most enchanting treasures. Located in the municipality of Acajutla, in the Sonsonate district, this expansive tropical paradise offers the perfect escape to enjoy the sun, sand, and the refreshing sea in all its splendor.Know moreJust an hour from the country’s capital, Costa Azul Beach is the ideal destination for a memorable day trip or a unique weekend getaway. Visitors often describe it as a slice of Eden, thanks to its stunning natural landscapes that are nothing short of a visual masterpiece. The warm, calm waters, especially during summer, invite you to relax and unwind.Surrounded by charming reefs, Costa Azul Beach is a haven for water sports enthusiasts. Whether you’re into snorkeling, diving, or simply exploring the vibrant marine life, this beach has it all. Its proximity to San Salvador ensures easy access to various amenities and services, making it a favorite among locals and tourists.For photography lovers, Costa Azul Beach is a dream come true. Every corner of this expansive shoreline is filled with picturesque details, from the golden sands to the crystal-clear waters and the captivating reefs. It’s the perfect backdrop for capturing unforgettable moments.During the summer months, guided diving tours are available, offering a chance to explore the rich marine biodiversity that thrives in the surrounding waters. Time seems to stand still as you encounter a variety of colorful marine species.On land, the beach’s vast stretches of sand are perfect for sunbathing, beach games, and sports, making it a delightful destination for adults and children. Whether you’re seeking adventure or relaxation, Costa Azul Beach has something for everyone.Undoubtedly, Costa Azul Beach is an exceptional destination for a family vacation. This natural jewel of El Salvador offers the perfect blend of pristine landscapes and serene beauty, allowing you to reconnect with nature and create lasting memories.Discover the magic of Costa Azul Beach—a place where the sea, sand, and sun come together to create an unforgettable experience.Contact us today to schedule a showing and take the first step toward owning your own piece of paradise.Features100 meters from the famous river mouth of Costa Azul1hr30 minutes driving distance from El Zonte beach1hr40 minutes from El Tunco Town1 hr drive from San Salvador*Note: -This showing may apply a feeListing updated: May 13, 2025Total Views: 1.922Relacionado

title: The Cliff: Where Luxury Meets the Ocean
location_text: A Lifestyle Beyond CompareWelcome toThe Cliff—an exclusive residential haven designed for those who seek the perfect harmony between luxury and nature. Located just3 minutes from world-class surf breaksin the heart ofSurf City, El Salvador, this development offers a rare blend of serenity, sophistication, andunmatched investment potential.Know moreSurf City isn’t just a destination—it’s thefuture of coastal living. With booming infrastructure, premium amenities, and skyrocketing property values, this is your chance to own a piece of paradise where every sunset feels like a masterpiece.Why The Cliff?Expansive Lots(800–1,200 sq. yards) – Generous spaces designed for privacy and panoramic ocean views.Smart, Nature-Inspired Design– Every lot is positioned to maximize breathtaking vistas and natural light.Green Living– Conservation areas and lush landscapes for a lifestyle in tune with the environment.Cutting-Edge Technology– High-speed fiber optics and 24/7 security monitored from your smartphone.Legal Security & Condominium Regime– Fully permitted, with structured governance for shared harmony.Gated & Secure– Controlled access ensuring peace of mind for you and your family.Surf City: The Rise of a Premier DestinationMore than just a surf paradise, Surf City is El Salvador’s fastest-growing coastal hub, featuring:Modern infrastructureShopping centers, medical services, and bankingWorld-class gyms and wellness spacesAccelerated real estate appreciationInvesting here means securing a lifestyle of exclusivity, profitability, and natural beauty—all while being part of a thriving community.Your Oceanfront Legacy AwaitsSpaces at The Cliff are limited—don’t miss this opportunity to own in one of Central America’s most sought-after developments.Contact us today to schedule a private tour or request more details!Live where the waves meet wonder.Payment methodsOwnership Made Simple1️⃣Reserve Your Lot– Start with a $5,000 deposit (deductible from your total investment).2️⃣10% Down Payment– Due within 15 days of reservation.3️⃣Flexible Payment Plan– Structured installments over 18 months (5% at 6, 12, and 18 months).4️⃣Final Payment– Remaining 75% upon signing the deed.Total Investment: 25% upfront, 75% at closingProperty SizeContact us for more information on pricing and lot sizes.Listing updated: May 30, 2025Total Views: 1.967Relacionado

title: LA VENTANA BEACH FRONT LOT
location_text: LA VENTANA PRIVATE COMMUNITYEmbark on an unparalleled investment journey in the exquisite LA VENTANA gated community, nestled along the enchanting west coast of El Salvador. This prime lot, situated in one of the region’s most exclusive private enclaves, promises an idyllic family-friendly haven. Indulge in the luxury of various lounging areas, a pristine beach club, and a secluded private beach, providing an oasis for property owners and their families.Features*Note: -This showing may apply a feeListing updated: May 30, 2025Total Views: 1.121Relacionado
